current_sprint: Phase 3 (3A-3H): Server setup, auth, game mgmt, state endpoints, actions, WebSocket, invites, testing

skipped_notes.T092-T093: Action execute-file line parsing/serialization — deferred, will be needed in Phase 2 when we implement the execute pipeline

conquer-engine.notes: Sprint 3 progress: trade, diplomacy (22 new tests), events (21 new tests), commands, nation, turn modules now enabled. 156 tests total. turn.rs now enabled with run_world_combat wrapper and update_nation_economy. T240: wdisaster() ported with 6 new tests.

conquer-server.notes: Full Axum HTTP+WS server. JWT auth, CORS, game management, state endpoints, action queue, WebSocket broadcast, invite system.

conquer-db.notes: In-memory GameStore with thread-safe Arc<RwLock<>>. argon2 password hashing. Postgres migration files ready. Fog of war, chat, invites.

conquer-oracle.notes: JSON loader, RNG cross-validation, enum roundtrips, data table verification
